properties.name: mybatis-plus.upsert.db-type
properties.description: Database type. Optional: auto-inferred from JDBC URL if not specified. Values: mysql | postgresql | oracle | sqlserver | h2 | custom

properties.name: mybatis-plus.upsert.use-new-mysql-syntax
properties.description: Whether to use the new MySQL upsert syntax (AS new) introduced in MySQL 8.0.19+. Set to false to use the legacy VALUES() syntax for backward compatibility.
